title: Brownie.
content:
There is a brown dolly
        Who has a guitar;
    She plays on it always,
        Tra lal, tra lal la!

    She has a new ditty
        For every day;
    I wish you could hear it,
        Tra lal, tra lal lay!
meaning:
"Brownie." is a quintessential example of Richard Hunter's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
